The bus broke down 70km before the destination while visiting haldwani . i got my refund back (good). again after a few days at delhi jaipur midway the bus took more than 90mins to charge and the speed during the whole journey is 60km/h on the road with speed limit of 120km/h. They didn't inform the passenger, how much time it will take to charge. we were waiting in serious heat of the bus cabin without AC

बस सेवा बेहतर है लेकिन हमारे साथ आएसबीटी नई दिल्ली बस स्टैंड पर एक एजेंट जिसका नाम नदीम अहमद था. अनाधिकृत रूप से चीटिंग की गई और दिल्ली से देहरादून 2 टिकिट का किराया ₹528/= की जगह ₹1000/= रुपए लिया गया. हमको दिल्ली से हरिद्वार जाना था हमने हरिद्वार का ही टिकिट मांगा था लेकिन जब हमने देखा तो वह देहरादून का टिकट था. Leafy bus वालों को इस पर एक्शन लेना चाहिए और अन्य यात्री भी ऐसे एजेंटो से सतर्क और सावधान रहें.

top_negative.text: LeafyBus PNR 513447: Delhi–Dehradun bus scheduled at 9:30 PM arrived around 11:50 PM. Only a 1-hour delay was communicated. Poor passenger communication and inconvenience caused

One of the worst travel experiences I have ever had. I received a confusing alert just one day before my journey, causing unnecessary stress about my booking. During the trip, the vehicle stopped midway for hours with no information or assistance provided. Despite multiple calls to customer support, I was repeatedly asked for my PNR and told that a ticket had been raised, but no real help was offered. I eventually had to make my own arrangements to reach my destination. Never will opt.

I booked an Intercity bus from Lucknow to Gorakhpur. However, I had a very disappointing experience. The bus did not stop at my designated boarding point to pick me up. I was present at the boarding location on time, and when I saw the bus approaching, I waved to the driver to stop, but the bus continued without stopping. Later, I was informed that the conductor had been waiting for me, which is completely untrue, as I was already at the boarding point and clearly visible when the bus passed by.
